text.title: Custom Hooks and Context Pattern
text.summary: Custom hook with typed result interface, Context provider with memoized value, and runtime context presence check.

rule.statement: Define an explicit return interface for every custom hook; do not return a plain tuple for hooks with more than two values.
rule.rationale: Named return properties self-document intent at the call site and survive refactoring without breaking destructuring order.

rule.statement: Initialize Context with null and throw in the consumer hook if accessed outside the provider.
rule.rationale: createContext(undefined) or a fake default silently provides wrong values; throwing a descriptive error surfaces the bug immediately.
